summary: High‑quality soundboard recording of a unique 1981 show with standout Jerry Garcia guitar work despite a lyric slip in Dark Star.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, especially Jerry’s singing and soaring guitar tone, calling the concert “stellar” and giving it four to five stars. The recording is a soundboard source that listeners found clear and enjoyable, with only a minor criticism of a missed lyric on Dark Star.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are detailed and highly positive about the musical performance; no recording flaws were reported, leading to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No complaints about clarity or mix; reviewers praised the overall sound and guitar tone. One reviewer mentioned having an original tape but did not note any audio problems in this release.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not discuss pacing, but highlighted the uniqueness of the performance and Jerry’s vocal/guitar moments.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for a sweet‑singing guitar tone; his voice was noted as breaking at times yet still preferred over others. A lyric slip on Dark Star was mentioned as a minor flaw.
